shows.title: Dark & Demonic Cases / Communicating After Death
shows.first_half: In the first half, guest host Ryan Wrecker (email) will speak with paranormal investigator Bill Slevin about intense cases of ghosts, hauntings, and other supernatural events. In the second half, Dr. Amy Robbins will discuss after-death communication, near-death experiences, and shared-death experiences, as well as the synergy between the psychological and the spiritual.
shows.second_half: 6-10pm PT: Art Bell - Somewhere in Time returns to 2/13/02 when researcher Michael C. Luckman discussed several intriguing topics, including the "new" face on Mars.

shows.title: Dark Folklore & Mythology / Paranormal Experiences
shows.first_half: First Half: Guest host Ryan Wrecker (email) welcomes Steven J. Rolfes for a discussion about dark folklore and mythology, including the shadowy world of Irish banshees and other supernatural messengers of death.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Paranormal researcher and second-generation astrologer Jeff Harman will talk about his lifelong encounters with supernatural phenomena, including ghosts, out-of-body experiences, near-death experiences, angelic and demonic experiences, UFO encounters, and more.

shows.title: Destiny in Numbers / The Power of Dreams
shows.first_half: First Half: Numerologist Glynis McCants will explain the study of numerology and how its patterns help us understand personality, destiny, and life cycles. She'll discuss core principles such as master numbers and reducing numbers, as well as how to identify vibrational energies.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Bonnie Buckner, PhD, will explain how messages in dreams are maps that can guide us in solving our challenges. She'll explain how dreamwork changes lives, and she'll also help us understand what's going on during dreams in order to access their healing power.

shows.title: Natural Remedies / Fighting the Enemy Within
shows.first_half: First Half: Pharmacist Ben Fuchs will discuss the many ways we can use natural remedies to help with ailments and health issues in addition to using modern medicine. Ben believes that supplementation and natural remedies are essential when it comes to everyday health.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author Jason Diamond will explore the limits of the human spirit as it faces both external and internal devastation. He'll examine the brutal cost of survival when the enemy is both outside and within one's own mind.

shows.title: Edgar Cayce's Legacy / Energy Transformation
shows.first_half: First Half: CEO Christopher Naughton will discuss the life of the "Sleeping Prophet" Edgar Cayce. Naughton will talk about Cayce's legacy of holistic medicine, as well as his channeling of esoteric knowledge regarding Egypt, Atlantis, reincarnation, and more.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Dr. Sue Morter will explain how to live your destiny the best you can. She'll explain how the body holds a deep energetic blueprint for healing and transformation; why so many people remain stuck in cycles of stress and anxiety; and how aligning your energy can restore clarity, purpose, and a sense of inner stability.

shows.title: Witnessing Miracles / Expanding Intuition
shows.guests: Joshua W. Brown, Tanya Carroll Richardson
shows.first_half: First Half: The time of miracles is upon us as Easter Sunday is just a few days away. Joshua W. Brown, PhD, will discuss modern-day claims of miraculous healings and what science and medicine have to say. He'll also talk about the numerous remarkable miracles he says he's seen on his many travels.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Spiritual author Tanya Carroll Richardson will explain how people can expand their intuition. She'll talk about the four main psychic pathways and their functions. Richardson will also outline how to manage your intuition when you're picking up on too much and become overwhelmed.

shows.title: Celebrities in the Afterlife /  Open Lines
shows.guests: Ben Jacob, Monique Ramirez, Open Lines
shows.first_half: Podcasters Ben Jocob and Monique Ramirez will detail their show Who's Dead From Your Favorite Movie, a program that discusses films and honors cast members that are now in the afterlife. They'll describe how they pay homage to the stars of iconic movies that never die. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half—give George a call and discuss whatever's on your mind!
